title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.11 - Improvise reworked: now costs 3 (2 upgraded) and always 'For each Planned card, draw 1 card. Remove Unplayable from all Planned cards' (keeps the cards Planned; no longer removes Planned). Requires BaseLib.
